brief: Market / Portal feature post for VOIDBORN — "Cash the Excess". Duplicates and dead slots still have value. List them, fund the next upgrade, and keep your binder lean for the decks you actually play. Explain: open Collection → pick a card → create listing at min price (based on market value), earn credits when another player buys, cancel anytime. In-game credits economy (no real-money P2P). Instagram hype + link in bio; Facebook walkthrough; Discord steps + https://voidborn.fun.

image.prompt: A close-up shot of a glowing ethereal marketplace portal made of shifting light and floating runes, surrounded by hovering holographic elemental card icons in a dark, atmospheric, cinematic fantasy setting.
